mapper.select: select count(*) from roleloginfo where userId = #{userId,jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.insert: insert into roleloginfo(userId, platUserId,platformName,os,maCode,uuid,createTime,lastLoginTime) values ( #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{platUserId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{platformName,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{os,jdbcType = VARCHAR}, #{maCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uuid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType = BIGINT}, #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType = BIGINT} )
mapper.update:
update roleloginfo
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT },
platformName = #{platformName,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
os = #{os,jdbcType = VARCHAR},
maCode = #{maCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uuid = #{uuid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType = BIGINT},
lastLoginTime = #{lastLoginTime,jdbcType = BIGINT}
where userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT }
